name: loan-agent
description: Orchestrates loan application and approval workflow for National Bank

skills.name: Loan application processing
skills.description: Accepts a loan request and runs the full approval workflow including policy checks, equity verification, and final decision

skills.name: Policy evaluation
skills.description: Evaluates loan requests against National Bank lending policy criteria

skills.name: Customer profile analysis
skills.description: Analyses customer credit rating and financial history for loan eligibility
